tracks.rawText: 2:48Echoes in My Bonesv5funk, Reggae dub foundation with weighty sub-bass, tape echoes, and syncopated drums; airy, emotional female vocals up close in the verses over a sparse groove, Chorus hits with big, distorted guitars and wider delays, lifting into an epic, anthemic feel, Dub FX and feedback swells weave between phrases, with strategic drops that leave just voice and bass before slamming back into the groove, deep, female vocals, minimal, vocal, dub, emotional, reggae2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Echoes in My Bones

tracks.rawText: 3:52Storm on the Shorev5Reggae dub groove with deep rolling subs, skanky offbeat guitars, and spacey tape-echo splashes, Female vocals, soft and intimate in the verses, then soaring and emotional in an epic, rock-infused chorus with heavy distorted guitars and stacked harmonies, Drums stay steady and hypnotic; dub drops and filter sweeps open up around the hook for maximum lift, dub, soft, reggae, emotional2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Storm on the Shore

tracks.rawText: 3:36Storm on the Shorev5Reggae dub groove with deep rolling subs, skanky offbeat guitars, and spacey tape-echo splashes, Female vocals, soft and intimate in the verses, then soaring and emotional in an epic, rock-infused chorus with heavy distorted guitars and stacked harmonies, Drums stay steady and hypnotic; dub drops and filter sweeps open up around the hook for maximum lift, dub, soft, reggae, emotional2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Storm on the Shore

tracks.rawText: 2:45“Worlds in His Hands”v5An infectious afrobeat groove kicks off with syncopated percussion, bright horns, and vibrant bass, layered beneath crackling boom box samples for a nostalgic edge, The young female singer’s vocals glide confidently over the rhythm, with backup harmonies and punchy instrumental breaks giving each section dynamic flair3PublishRemix
tracks.title: “Worlds in His Hands”

tracks.rawText: 2:31“Worlds in His Hands”v5An infectious afrobeat groove kicks off with syncopated percussion, bright horns, and vibrant bass, layered beneath crackling boom box samples for a nostalgic edge, The young female singer’s vocals glide confidently over the rhythm, with backup harmonies and punchy instrumental breaks giving each section dynamic flair3PublishRemix
tracks.title: “Worlds in His Hands”

tracks.rawText: 5:11Raíz y Pantallav5Deep dub-reggae groove with a heavy sub and crisp one-drop drums, skanking guitars chopping on the offbeat, Spacey synth pads and echoing leads weave in and out, with processed male vocals delivering spoken-sung social commentary in the verses, Chorus blooms into stacked rhythmic chants, ping-pong delays, and widening reverbs for a hypnotic, trance-like lift that rides the line between roots and futuristic electronica, reggae4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Raíz y Pantalla

tracks.rawText: 5:23Raíz y Pantallav5Deep dub-reggae groove with a heavy sub and crisp one-drop drums, skanking guitars chopping on the offbeat, Spacey synth pads and echoing leads weave in and out, with processed male vocals delivering spoken-sung social commentary in the verses, Chorus blooms into stacked rhythmic chants, ping-pong delays, and widening reverbs for a hypnotic, trance-like lift that rides the line between roots and futuristic electronica, reggae3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Raíz y Pantalla

tracks.rawText: 3:08Raíz de Bajo Profundov5Deep dubwise groove blending classic roots skank and spacious electronic echoes; sub-heavy bass locks with a lazy one-drop, bright offbeat chords, and filtered synth swells, Male vocals sit warm and close, with dub delays blooming at phrase ends; chorus lifts with stacked harmonies and subtle melodica lines weaving in and out, Final third strips back to bass and percussion, then swells for a head-nodding outro chant, dub, reggae3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Raíz de Bajo Profundo

tracks.rawText: 3:20Raíz de Bajo Profundov5Deep dubwise groove blending classic roots skank and spacious electronic echoes; sub-heavy bass locks with a lazy one-drop, bright offbeat chords, and filtered synth swells, Male vocals sit warm and close, with dub delays blooming at phrase ends; chorus lifts with stacked harmonies and subtle melodica lines weaving in and out, Final third strips back to bass and percussion, then swells for a head-nodding outro chant, dub, reggae2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Raíz de Bajo Profundo

tracks.rawText: 3:21Raíz de Humo y Metalv5Deep dub-reggae fusion with sub-heavy bass, spring reverb stabs, and hazy electronic echoes, Male vocals in an intimate, close-mic tone; verses ride a spacious half-time groove with filtered synth swells, Chorus blooms with stacked harmonies, offbeat skanks, and a wider stereo field, Occasional delayed vocal chops and riser sweeps lift transitions while the low-end stays huge and warm, dub, reggae2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Raíz de Humo y Metal

tracks.title: Raíz de Humo y Metal

tracks.rawText: 3:43Raíz de Bajov5Slow-burning roots-dub fusion with cavernous sub-bass and spaced-out delays, Male vocals ride a lazy half-time skank, with springy guitar chops and warm organ bubbles, Choruses bloom with stacked harmonies and filtered echo swells, while the verses stay close and intimate, Occasional synth swells and filtered risers add a smoky electronic haze over a deep, head-nodding groove, reggae, dub5PublishRemix
tracks.title: Raíz de Bajo
